/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Game/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Components/Component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Components/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Core/Objeto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Inputs/PollEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Render/Render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Utils/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Code/Utils/Vector2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/OpenGL/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/OpenGL/Vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/__/Engine/Engine.cpp.o -o /home/ATC/Documents/Engine/bin/Debug/Engine  ../../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a ../../libglad_gl_core_33.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
